In the 2021 rugby league season, [[York City Knights]] competed in the [[2021 RFL Championship]], the [[2021 Challenge Cup]] and the [[2021 RFL 1895 Cup]]. It was the first season that the club played at the [[York Community Stadium]].<ref name=firstgame/> At the RFL end of year awards York was named as the Championship Club of the Year.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.rugby-league.com/article/36086/betfred-championship-and-league-1-awards-%E2%80%93-winners-announced |title=Betfred Championship and League 1 Awards' winners announced |publisher=RFL |date=29 September 2021 |access-date=6 December 2023}}</ref>

===Challenge Cup / 1895 Cup===
{{main|2021 Challenge Cup|2021 RFL 1895 Cup}}
In the 2021 season, the [[Challenge Cup]] and [[RFL 1895 Cup]] used a format where the four sides which progressed from the second round of the Challenge Cup qualified for the 1895 Cup semi-finals.<ref>{{cite web |title=Championship, L1 and Cups structure confirmed |url=https://www.seriousaboutrl.com/championship-l1-and-cups-structure-confirmed-35853/ |website=Serious About Rugby League |access-date=21 March 2021 |date=23 December 2020}}</ref>

===Internationals===
Members of the 2021 York squad who earned international caps this year:
*{{rl|Jamaica}}
**[[Ben Jones-Bishop]] ''v.'' {{rlnt|Scotland}}, 24 October 2021<ref>{{cite web|url=https://europeanrugbyleague.com/articles/2048/reggae-warriors-name-squad-to-face-scotl... |title=Reggae Warriors name squad to face Scotland |website=European Rugby League |date=20 October 2021|access-date=7 March 2026}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://europeanrugbyleague.com/articles/2053/jamaica-and-scotland-share-spoils-in-sup...  |title=Jamaica and Scotland share spoils in superb Test encounter |website=European Rugby League |date=24 October 2021 |access-date=7 March 2026}}</ref>{{efn|Also playing in the match were [[Jacob Ogden]] (Jamaica), [[Joe Brown (rugby league)|Joe Brown]] and [[Will Oakes]] (both Scotland) who had all recently signed for York for the 2022 season<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/jacob-ogden-targets-world-cup-spot-after-joining-york |title=Jacob Ogden targets World Cup spot after joining York |website=Love Rugby League |date=15 October 2021 |access-date=10 January 2024}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/york-land-bradford-winger-joe-brown |title=York land Bradford winger Joe Brown |website=Love Rugby League |date=25 September 2021 |access-date=10 January 2024}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/york-land-scotland-international-will-oakes |title=York land international winger for 2022 |website=Love Rugby League |date=21 October 2021 |access-date=10 January 2024}}</ref>}}
